title: Common Alternative Names for a Project Initiation Document (PID)
summary: Provides the most frequently used synonyms for a Project Initiation Document across various project‑management methodologies, clarifying that the intent of each term is identical.
content: Project Initiation Documents are also known as Project Charters or Project Briefs. While the terminology varies, the purpose remains the same: to capture essential project information at the outset.
can_answer: What are alternative names for a Project Initiation Document?
Is a Project Charter the same as a PID?
Which terms are synonymous with PID?
